glosses.ja: 女性のコーチ; 女性トレーナー

sentences.target: Meine Trainerin kommt heute etwas später.

translations.de: Meine Trainerin kommt heute etwas später.
translations.en: My trainer is coming a bit later today.
translations.es: Mi entrenadora llegará un poco más tarde hoy.
translations.fr: Ma coach arrive un peu plus tard aujourd'hui.
translations.it: La mia allenatrice arriverà un po' più tardi oggi.
translations.zh-Hans: 我的教练今天会晚一点到。
translations.yue: 我個教練今日會遲啲到。
translations.ru: Мой тренер придет сегодня немного позже.
translations.pt: Minha treinadora vai chegar um pouco mais tarde hoje.
translations.he: המאמנת שלי תגיע היום קצת מאוחר יותר.
translations.tr: Antrenörüm bugün biraz daha geç gelecek.
translations.vi: Huấn luyện viên của tôi hôm nay đến muộn một chút.
translations.nl: Mijn trainster komt vandaag wat later.
translations.uk: Моя тренерка сьогодні прийде трохи пізніше.
translations.hu: Az edzőnőm ma egy kicsit később jön.
translations.hi: मेरी ट्रेनर आज थोड़ी देर से आएगी।
translations.pl: Moja trenerka przyjdzie dziś trochę później.
translations.el: Η προπονήτριά μου θα έρθει σήμερα λίγο αργότερα.
translations.nb: Treneren min kommer litt senere i dag.
translations.id: Pelatih saya akan datang agak terlambat hari ini.
translations.sv: Min tränare kommer lite senare i dag.
translations.ro: Antrenoarea mea va ajunge puțin mai târziu astăzi.
translations.cs: Moje trenérka dnes přijde o něco později.
translations.da: Min træner kommer lidt senere i dag.
translations.ja: 私のトレーナーは今日は少し遅れて来ます。

tokens.explanation: Possessive determiner; agrees with a feminine singular noun in nominative; determines 'Trainerin' (subject).
Feminine singular noun in nominative; head of the subject NP.
Finite main verb, present tense, 3rd person singular.
Temporal adverb modifying the verb.
Degree adverb meaning 'a bit', modifying 'später'.
Comparative temporal adverb; head of the degree phrase 'etwas später'.

sentences.target: Ich frage die Trainerin nach dem Trainingsplan.
sentences.reading: /ɪç ˈfʁaːɡə diː tʁeːnəʁɪn naːx deːm ˈtʁeːnɪŋsplaːn/

translations.de: Ich frage die Trainerin nach dem Trainingsplan.
translations.ipa: /ɪç ˈfʁaːɡə diː tʁeːnəʁɪn naːx deːm ˈtʁeːnɪŋsplaːn/
translations.en: I ask the trainer about the workout plan.
translations.es: Le pregunto a la entrenadora sobre el plan de entrenamiento.
translations.fr: Je demande à la coach le programme d'entraînement.
translations.it: Chiedo all'allenatrice del programma di allenamento.
translations.ko: 저는 트레이너에게 운동 계획에 대해 물어봐요.
translations.zh-Hans: 我问教练训练计划怎么安排。
translations.ru: Я спрашиваю тренера о плане тренировок.
translations.pt: Eu pergunto à treinadora sobre o plano de treino.
translations.he: אני פונה למאמנת לגבי תוכנית האימונים.
translations.vi: Tôi hỏi huấn luyện viên về kế hoạch tập luyện.
translations.nl: Ik vraag de trainster naar het trainingsschema.
translations.uk: Я запитую тренерку про план тренувань.
translations.hi: मैं ट्रेनर से वर्कआउट प्लान के बारे में पूछता हूँ।
translations.el: Ρωτάω την προπονήτρια για το πρόγραμμα προπόνησης.
translations.id: Saya bertanya kepada pelatih tentang rencana latihan.
translations.ro: Întreb antrenoarea despre planul de antrenament.
translations.cs: Ptám se trenérky na tréninkový plán.
translations.ja: 私はトレーナーにトレーニング計画について聞きます。

tokens.explanation: 1st person singular nominative pronoun; subject.
Finite main verb, present tense, 1st person singular; selects an accusative object and a 'nach'+dative complement.
Definite article, feminine accusative singular; determiner of 'Trainerin' (direct object).
Feminine singular noun in accusative; direct object of 'frage'.
Preposition governing dative; introduces the topic being asked about.
Definite article, masculine dative singular; determiner of 'Trainingsplan' after 'nach'.
Masculine singular noun in dative; object of the preposition 'nach'.

sentences.target: Die Trainerin zeigt uns neue Übungen.

translations.de: Die Trainerin zeigt uns neue Übungen.
translations.en: The trainer shows us new exercises.
translations.es: La entrenadora nos muestra ejercicios nuevos.
translations.fr: La coach nous montre de nouveaux exercices.
translations.zh-Hans: 教练给我们示范新动作。
translations.pt: A treinadora nos mostra novos exercícios.
translations.vi: Huấn luyện viên hướng dẫn chúng tôi những bài tập mới.
translations.nl: De trainster laat ons nieuwe oefeningen zien.
translations.hu: Az edzőnő új gyakorlatokat mutat nekünk.
translations.hi: ट्रेनर हमें नए व्यायाम दिखाती है।
translations.el: Η προπονήτρια μας δείχνει καινούριες ασκήσεις.
translations.id: Pelatih menunjukkan latihan baru kepada kami.
translations.ja: トレーナーが私たちに新しいエクササイズを見せてくれます。

tokens.explanation: Definite article, feminine nominative singular; determiner of the subject.
Feminine singular noun in nominative; head of the subject NP.
Finite main verb, present tense, 3rd person singular; ditransitive with dative recipient and accusative theme.
1st person plural dative pronoun; indirect object/recipient of 'zeigt'.
Attributive adjective, plural accusative; agrees with 'Übungen'.
Plural accusative noun; direct object/theme of 'zeigt'.

translations.en: Lisa trusts her trainer a lot.
translations.es: Lisa confía mucho en su entrenadora.
translations.fr: Lisa fait beaucoup confiance à sa coach.
translations.it: Lisa si fida molto della sua allenatrice.
translations.zh-Hans: 丽莎非常信任她的教练。
translations.pt: Lisa confia muito na treinadora dela.
translations.he: ליסה סומכת מאוד על המאמנת שלה.
translations.vi: Lisa rất tin tưởng huấn luyện viên của mình.
translations.hi: लीसा अपनी ट्रेनर पर बहुत भरोसा करती है।
translations.el: Η Λίζα εμπιστεύεται πολύ την προπονήτριά της.
translations.nb: Lisa stoler veldig på treneren sin.
translations.sv: Lisa litar mycket på sin tränare.
translations.ro: Lisa are mare încredere în antrenoarea ei.
translations.da: Lisa stoler meget på sin træner.
translations.ja: リサはトレーナーをとても信頼しています。

tokens.explanation: Proper noun; subject (personal name).
Finite main verb, present tense, 3rd person singular; selects a dative object.
Possessive determiner in dative feminine singular; modifies 'Trainerin' (possessor: 'her').
Feminine singular noun in dative; complement of 'vertraut'.
Degree adverb intensifying the predicate.
